channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: 📰 本日のAI・テックニュース（抜粋） 1. イーロン・マスクの軌道上データセンター構想に疑問の声、ソフトバンク会長…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
📰 本日のAI・テックニュース（抜粋）

1. イーロン・マスクの軌道上データセンター構想に疑問の声、ソフトバンク会長も懐疑的
2. Sunoが独立系アーティストを支援する「Spark」インキュベータプログラムを立ち上げ
3. ジム・ヘンソンが制作した知られざき傑作「The Cube」はBlack Mirrorの先駆け作品

本日の注目ニュース全10本はnoteで → https://note.com/grim1149/m/m7fde0cd2638a
📮 全件＋詳細はメルマガで → https://grimmiraai.substack.com/

#AIニュース #ChatGPT #生...
item.content:encoded:
📰 本日のAI・テックニュース（抜粋）

1. イーロン・マスクの軌道上データセンター構想に疑問の声、ソフトバンク会長も懐疑的
2. Sunoが独立系アーティストを支援する「Spark」インキュベータプログラムを立ち上げ
3. ジム・ヘンソンが制作した知られざき傑作「The Cube」はBlack Mirrorの先駆け作品

本日の注目ニュース全10本はnoteで → https://note.com/grim1149/m/m7fde0cd2638a
📮 全件＋詳細はメルマガで → https://grimmiraai.substack.com/

#AIニュース #ChatGPT #生...

item.title: アメリカのナンタケット。この町はメルヴィル『白鯨』の舞台となった町であり、イシュメールやエイハブたちはここから船に乗って…
item.author: バーナム博物館長 (@barnummuseum.bsky.social)
item.description:
アメリカのナンタケット。この町はメルヴィル『白鯨』の舞台となった町であり、イシュメールやエイハブたちはここから船に乗って航海に出ました。『白鯨』の舞台となったことからも分かる通りここは古くから捕鯨で栄えた町であり、町の中には捕鯨博物館もあります。今日町は高級リゾート地になっており、海岸にはたくさんの別荘が並んでいます。
#アート
item.content:encoded:
アメリカのナンタケット。この町はメルヴィル『白鯨』の舞台となった町であり、イシュメールやエイハブたちはここから船に乗って航海に出ました。『白鯨』の舞台となったことからも分かる通りここは古くから捕鯨で栄えた町であり、町の中には捕鯨博物館もあります。今日町は高級リゾート地になっており、海岸にはたくさんの別荘が並んでいます。
#アート

item.description:
Google launches Nano Banana 2 Lite, a low cost text-to-image model that delivers outputs in four seconds, and rolls out Gemini Omni Flash to developers (The Keyword)

item.title: I went to the Quinault Rainforest in the Olympic National Pa…
item.author: Carl Prothman (@carlprothman.bsky.social)
item.description:
I went to the Quinault Rainforest in the Olympic National Park this past weekend. And hiked the Maple Glade Trail.

It is the kind of trail where every few steps reveal another quiet forest detail. The ferns and moss-covered trees were amazing. It felt like walking through a magical landscape.
item.content:encoded:
I went to the Quinault Rainforest in the Olympic National Park this past weekend. And hiked the Maple Glade Trail.

It is the kind of trail where every few steps reveal another quiet forest detail. The ferns and moss-covered trees were amazing. It felt like walking through a magical landscape.

item.title: #今月描いた絵を晒そう 繁忙期を乗り越えたはずなのに、なぜか今まで以上に仕事が忙しくなった今月。ちゃんと最後まで描けたの…
item.author: キノサキ@うたかた創作マルシェ2 (@kinosaki-n.bsky.social)
item.description:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう
繁忙期を乗り越えたはずなのに、なぜか今まで以上に仕事が忙しくなった今月。ちゃんと最後まで描けたのは着せたいタグのイラスト3枚のみでした……少ない🥲ですが普段描かないものを描くタグを走っているので、途中調べ物をしたり、映画を見たりと、なにげに充実した一ヶ月を過ごしたような気がします。今月もありがとうございました✨
来月こそはタグ完走します……
#キノサキ図画　#オオサカウーロンズ
item.content:encoded:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう
繁忙期を乗り越えたはずなのに、なぜか今まで以上に仕事が忙しくなった今月。ちゃんと最後まで描けたのは着せたいタグのイラスト3枚のみでした……少ない🥲ですが普段描かないものを描くタグを走っているので、途中調べ物をしたり、映画を見たりと、なにげに充実した一ヶ月を過ごしたような気がします。今月もありがとうございました✨
来月こそはタグ完走します……
#キノサキ図画　#オオサカウーロンズ

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: It was one of the most emot…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: It was one of the most emotional moments of the World Cup so far.

Cody Gakpo scored for the Netherlands days after the death of his unborn son. He fell to the ground, and his teammates, including substitutes, raced to embrace him. nyti.ms/4ePAwRv
item.content:encoded:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: It was one of the most emotional moments of the World Cup so far.

Cody Gakpo scored for the Netherlands days after the death of his unborn son. He fell to the ground, and his teammates, including substitutes, raced to embrace him. nyti.ms/4ePAwRv

item.title: NEW: Oil companies are blasting millions of gallons of toxic…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: Oil companies are blasting millions of gallons of toxic waste underground each year — less than a half-mile from Enid, Oklahoma’s water wells.

But to protect their city, officials must appeal to the state agency that created the problem.

With @readfrontier.bsky.social
item.content:encoded:
NEW: Oil companies are blasting millions of gallons of toxic waste underground each year — less than a half-mile from Enid, Oklahoma’s water wells.

But to protect their city, officials must appeal to the state agency that created the problem.

With @readfrontier.bsky.social

item.title: Lake Superior covers about 82,100 square kilometers or 31,69…
item.author: Luca (@lucagalletti.bsky.social)
item.description: Lake Superior covers about 82,100 square kilometers or 31,699 square miles, making it the largest freshwater lake by area in the world. 🇨🇦🇺🇸

item.title: UNFUN FACT: The 2026 FIFA World Cup features 48 teams co-hos…
item.author: Hoodlum 🇺🇸 (@nothoodlum.bsky.social)
item.description: UNFUN FACT: The 2026 FIFA World Cup features 48 teams co-hosted by the US, Canada, and Mexico. Of the 48 participating nations, the United States is the only one without a universal health care system.
item.content:encoded: UNFUN FACT: The 2026 FIFA World Cup features 48 teams co-hosted by the US, Canada, and Mexico. Of the 48 participating nations, the United States is the only one without a universal health care system.

item.title: As the mom of two girls who play sports let me just say: I c…
item.author: KSV (@ksvesq.bsky.social)
item.description: As the mom of two girls who play sports let me just say: I could give a fuck about the sex at birth of any child they play with or against. Condoning the policing of youth sports in this manner is bigoted.
item.content:encoded: As the mom of two girls who play sports let me just say: I could give a fuck about the sex at birth of any child they play with or against. Condoning the policing of youth sports in this manner is bigoted.

item.title: You might disagree with Kavanaugh about the constitutionalit…
item.author: Ned Resnikoff (@resnikoff.bsky.social)
item.description: You might disagree with Kavanaugh about the constitutionality of high school athlete genital inspections, but you can't deny he's always been very consistent in his support for nonconsensually groping teen girls.
item.content:encoded: You might disagree with Kavanaugh about the constitutionality of high school athlete genital inspections, but you can't deny he's always been very consistent in his support for nonconsensually groping teen girls.

item.title: Been reading On Courage. It should be required reading for …
item.author: Christopher Webb (@cwebbonline.com)
item.description:
Been reading On Courage.

It should be required reading for Dems:

“This basic arithmetic problem means sometimes living with contradictions, even embracing them.”

Politics isn’t about finding people who agree w/you on everything. It’s finding enough people to push the jeep out of the mud together.
item.content:encoded:
Been reading On Courage.

It should be required reading for Dems:

“This basic arithmetic problem means sometimes living with contradictions, even embracing them.”

Politics isn’t about finding people who agree w/you on everything. It’s finding enough people to push the jeep out of the mud together.
